content.text:
[cron:9068fcd8-0a66-4401-9d01-a9eea9b89663 s1-worker-1] Read Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\.vsm\POLICY.md. Read Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\.vsm\DIRECTIVE.md. Read Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\.vsm\LOCKS.md. Read Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\.vsm\ACTIVE.md. Find your slot: SLOT-1. If SLOT-1 has a task assigned to s1-worker-1: read the target file, make the change surgically using find-and-replace, verify the file, update SLOT-1 status to done. If the change is ONLY writing or adding to Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\ai\ and no source files were modified, run: git -C Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO add ai/ && git -C Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO commit -m docs: s1-worker-1 update. If SLOT-1 is idle do nothing. One file. One change.
Current time: Wednesday, March 4th, 2026 — 12:04 AM (America/Los_Angeles)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
